name: goalos-ai
description: GoalOS AI — open-source productivity OS + enterprise SaaS platform
author: Akhil Vydyula

scripts.build: npm ci --prefix goalos-web && npm run build --prefix goalos-web
scripts.saas:build: npm run build --workspace=@goalos/shared && npm run db:generate --workspace=@goalos/database && npm run build --workspace=@goalos/database
scripts.saas:setup: npm run saas:build && npm run saas:db:push && npm run saas:db:seed
scripts.saas:dev: npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- concurrently -n gateway,auth,goals,usage,coach,insights -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run saas:dev:gateway" "npm run saas:dev:auth" "npm run saas:dev:goals" "npm run saas:dev:usage" "npm run saas:dev:coach" "npm run saas:dev:insights"
